title: Crackdown
short_description: An open-world action game set in a crime-ridden future city, where players are genetically enhanced agents with superhuman abilities.
description: Crackdown is an open-world action game developed by Realtime Worlds and published by Microsoft Game Studios. Set in Pacific City, a sprawling metropolis divided between three criminal organisations, players take the role of a genetically enhanced Agent with superhuman strength, agility, firearms, driving, and explosives skills that can be levelled up through use. Notably, the game shipped bundled with access to the Halo 3 multiplayer beta, driving significant sales. It received broadly positive reviews and spawned two sequels published by Microsoft.
